# Spec: Worktree dir collision + porcelain rename

## Intent

The task-worktree directory name must join the spec/task slugs with a `~` (a char `is_safe_segment`
forbids in a slug, so the boundary is unambiguous and flat тАФ no nesting), so distinct spec/task
pairs that a flat `-` join collided on (`auth`+`login-form` vs `auth-login`+`form`) get distinct
dirs. And `worktree_changed_files` must run `git status --porcelain -z` and parse NUL fields,
skipping a rename/copy's OLD-path field, so a filename literally containing ` -> ` is no longer
mis-split.

## Non-goals

- Not a change to the frozen checks contract.
- Not the #25 C1/C3 surface (already landed in the prior wave).

## Requirements

### AC-001 тАФ worktree dir names are collision-free

When two distinct spec/task pairs would flat-`-`-join to the same string, the `~`-joined worktree
dir names must be distinct.

Verify with: `pnpm run test:run` (the worktreeNames regression spec)

### AC-002 тАФ porcelain rename parsing is NUL-safe

When a changed filename literally contains ` -> `, `git status --porcelain -z` parsing must not
mis-split it (skip the rename/copy OLD-path field).

Verify with: `pnpm run test:run` (the workspace git regression spec)

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/modules/Core/services/worktreeNames.ts`
- `src/modules/Workspace/useCases/git.ts`

# Task: Wave 4 follow-up тАФ full-fix #25 C2 (worktree collision) + C4 (porcelain rename)

## Source

- Spec: `specs/worktree-porcelain/spec.md` (SPEC-worktree-porcelain)

## Scope

- **#25 C2** task worktree dir name now joins the slugs with `~` (a char `is_safe_segment` forbids
  in a slug, so the boundary is unambiguous and flat тАФ no nesting). Distinct spec/task pairs that
  flat `-` join collided on (`auth`+`login-form` vs `auth-login`+`form`) now get distinct dirs.
- **#25 C4** `worktree_changed_files` runs `git status --porcelain -z` and parses NUL fields,
  skipping a rename/copy's OLD-path field тАФ a filename literally containing ` -> ` is no longer
  mis-split. (The committed-diff side still reconciles via the union Set.)

## Do not change

- The frozen checks contract.

## Affected areas

- `src/modules/Core/services/worktreeNames.ts` (#25 C2)
- `src/modules/Workspace/useCases/git.ts` (#25 C4)

## Verify

- [ ] swarm-cli: `typecheck` ┬╖ `test:run` (615) ┬╖ `lint` ┬╖ `deps:validate`
- [ ] real-git regression: collision distinctness (#25 C2); a rename whose old name contains ` -> ` (#25 C4)

## Agent instructions

1. Stay in scope; paste real Verify output; re-read as a skeptic.

## Run summary

- Changed files: worktreeNames.ts, git.ts (+ tests). Landed swarm-cli `942f725`.
- Verify results: `typecheck` 0 ┬╖ `test:run` 0 (615) ┬╖ `lint` 0 ┬╖ `deps:validate` 0. Real-git
  regression tests (collision distinctness + a rename whose old name contains ` -> `). Independent
  review pass.
- Out-of-scope edits: none.
- Blocked questions: none. #25 closed.
